lossItems.downstreamRisk: Frozen submission lineage is not emitted into the draft ISOXML bridge payload.
lossItems.mitigation: Retain fileable lineage inside OFARM and bind the bridge artifact back to publication, authority, and evidence refs.

lossItems.externalConstructRef: ISOXML task controller execution status detail
lossItems.downstreamRisk: Fine-grained machine status detail may collapse into a smaller reversible subset even when the declared task semantics remain stable.
lossItems.mitigation: Expose the collapse posture in the bridge trace and retain the OFARM-normalized execution evidence.

notes: Illustrative managed-loss posture for the draft ISOXML export bridge subset.
